title: Milestone-scoped report generation
description: PM tools can generate full-project reports (pm-report.js) and per-ticket assessments (pm-assess.js), but there is no tool to generate a focused, readable report for a single milestone. Operators need milestone-scoped reports for standups, stakeholder updates, and milestone reviews.

questions.question: Should this extend pm-report.js or be a standalone script?

proposed_options.label: Extend pm-report.js with --milestone flag
proposed_options.description: Add --milestone M1 flag to existing report script

operator_response.rationale: Extend existing tool with --milestone flag for consistency

questions.question: What output formats should be supported?

operator_response.rationale: JSON for programmatic consumption, Markdown for humans
